---
title: "OutputSlotWidget"
---

## Overview

`dl::widget::OutputSlotWidget` is the per-output editor used by
`DeepLearningPropertiesWidget`. It configures where decoded model outputs are
written in DataManager.

**Header:** `DeepLearning_Widget/UI/Helpers/OutputSlotWidget.hpp`  
**Source:** `src/WhiskerToolbox/DeepLearning_Widget/UI/Helpers/`

## Architecture

The widget wraps a single `AutoParamWidget` driven by `dl::OutputBindingForm`:

```cpp
struct OutputBindingForm {
    std::string data_key;
    DecoderVariant decoder = MaskDecoderParams{};
};
```

The widget shell supplies `slot_name` from `TensorSlotDescriptor`. Full bindings
are exposed as `OutputBindingData` via `binding()` / `setBinding()`.

UI layout per slot:

- Group box titled with the model output slot name and optional description tooltip
- Shape label from slot metadata
- Schema-driven decoder tagged-union form and target (`data_key`) combo

When the decoder selection changes, `SlotAssembler::dataTypeForDecoder()` filters
the target combo to compatible DataManager keys. The parent may call
`updateDecoderAlternatives()` to restrict visible decoders when the post-encoder
module changes effective output shapes.

## API

| Method | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| `binding()` | Current `OutputBindingData` for this slot |
| `setBinding()` | Restore binding from session state |
| `refreshDataSources()` | Re-populate the target combo from DataManager |
| `updateDecoderAlternatives()` | Restrict decoder choices (e.g. post-encoder filtering) |
| `slotName()` | Model output slot name |

## Signals

| Signal | Emitted when |
|---|---|
| `bindingChanged()` | Any decoder or target field changes |

## Inference path

The widget owns only UI state. `SlotAssembler` validates bindings and performs
terminal decoding during inference. See
[Binding parameter schemas](../../../../DeepLearning/bindings/binding_param_schemas.qmd).
